Scenario: Signup creates profile and requires email verification
Steps: Open AuthScreen -> Sign up with username/email/password
Expected Result: New Firebase Auth user created, displayName set, verification email sent, users/{uid} doc has username,email,provider=password,createdAt,lastLoginAt,hasSeenOnboarding=false

Precondition: Email field used for username mismatch or empty password
Steps: Open AuthScreen as Sign up, fill mismatched email/confirmEmail or empty required fields
Expected Result: User sees validation message and sign-up not triggered

Scenario: Sign in with email updates last login and onboarding flag
Steps: Open AuthScreen as Sign in with valid credentials
Expected Result: Sign in succeeds, users/{uid}.lastLoginAt updated; users doc keeps/sets hasSeenOnboarding when missing

Scenario: Google sign-in handles existing email-provider mismatch
Precondition: Email registered with password is used in Google flow
Steps: Click Sign in with Google with same email
Expected Result: Error shown: must use original sign-in method (provider-mismatch handling)

Steps: Enter email and tap Forgot Password?
Expected Result: Confirmation or error snackbar; if email invalid/empty shows inline error

Precondition: User has lastLoginAt older than 90 days
Expected Result: AuthGate routes to AuthScreen for re-login before normal flow

Scenario: Theme toggle persists across app launches
Precondition: App running with theme controller initialized
Steps: Go to Profile tab > Profile screen > toggle Dark Mode ON then relaunch app
Expected Result: App opens in dark mode and toggle state is remembered
Splash shows for ~3 seconds then transitions to AuthGate route
AuthGate displays AuthScreen

Precondition: User signed in with email but emailVerified=false
Expected Result: Email verify screen is shown, not main app
Onboarding screen is shown before main tours flow

Scenario: Legacy admin fallback still allows access
Precondition: User uid/email listed by legacy admin query or local fallback set
Expected Result: App opens AdminXrHomeScreen

Precondition: Break network/rule access for admin doc/user profile temporarily
Expected Result: Main path never hard-crashes; shows auth UI or controlled error states per code path

Steps: Land on onboarding and wait 3+ seconds
Expected Result: Quotes rotate every 3 seconds on current slide; swipe slides preserved
AuthService.markOnboardingAsSeen writes hasSeenOnboarding=true; next auth flow goes to tour screen

Expected Result: Home loads quickly from cache and refreshes from Firestore eventually
